creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
bapt        2012-01-19 23:13:34 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    x11-fonts            Makefile 
  Added files:
    x11-fonts/croscorefonts-fonts-ttf Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                      pkg-plist 
    x11-fonts/croscorefonts-fonts-ttf/files pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  Google has created a set of fonts for it's ChromeOS Operating system.
  
  The three standard ones closely  mimic the most popular ones for
  the Windows platform and the linuxso-called Liberation fonts but
  are available under an OpenFont license.
  
  Tinos, Arimo and Cousine, appear to be variations of the old
  standard  Times, Arial and Courier.
  
  PR:             ports/164229
  Submitted by:   Pedro Giffuni
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.134     +1 -0      ports/x11-fonts/Makefile
  1.1       +56 -0     ports/x11-fonts/croscorefonts-fonts-ttf/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/x11-fonts/croscorefonts-fonts-ttf/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/x11-fonts/croscorefonts-fonts-ttf/files/pkg-message.in (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/x11-fonts/croscorefonts-fonts-ttf/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +18 -0     ports/x11-fonts/croscorefonts-fonts-ttf/pkg-plist (new)
